YACHIYO_SHRINE.title: Yachiyo Shrine
YACHIYO_SHRINE.description: Upon pickup, add a [gold]Remember[/gold] to your deck.
YACHIYO_SHRINE.flavor: A limited-edition shrine of virtual YouTuber Yachiyo! Represents the beginning of everything.
TSUKUYOMI_SHRINE.title: Handshake Ticket
TSUKUYOMI_SHRINE.description: Upon pickup, add a [gold]Starlit Sea[/gold] to your deck.
TSUKUYOMI_SHRINE.flavor: The night doesn't start without her! Enjoy Yachiyo's concert to the fullest!
KAGUYA_ACCOUNT.title: Kaguya's Account
KAGUYA_ACCOUNT.description: Upon pickup, add a [gold]I Love Myself![/gold] to your deck.
KAGUYA_ACCOUNT.flavor: The social media account of newbie vtuber Kaguya-hime, documenting her growth journey.
HAPPY_SYNTHESIZER_RELIC.title: Happy Synthesizer
HAPPY_SYNTHESIZER_RELIC.description: Upon pickup, add a [gold]Happy Synthesizer[/gold] to your deck.
HAPPY_SYNTHESIZER_RELIC.flavor: The melody that wipes away tears, keep playing it.
PERFORMANCE_COSTUME.title: Performance Costume
PERFORMANCE_COSTUME.description: Upon pickup, add a [gold]World's Number One Princess[/gold] to your deck.
PERFORMANCE_COSTUME.flavor: Tell me, who is the world's number one princess?
TEARS_OF_MEMORY.title: Tears of Memory
TEARS_OF_MEMORY.description: Upon pickup, add an [gold]Ex-Otogibanashi[/gold] to your deck.
TEARS_OF_MEMORY.flavor: The scenery we shared together — I've already remembered it ten thousand times.
PARTING_GIFT.title: Farewell Gift
PARTING_GIFT.description: Upon pickup, lose {HpLoss} Max HP, add a [gold]Transient Symphony[/gold] and a [gold]Reply[/gold] to your deck.
PARTING_GIFT.flavor: “Though I hate to say goodbye, my story ends here =)”
IDEAL.title: Ideal
IDEAL.description: Upon pickup, add a [gold]Ray[/gold] to your deck.
ORDINARY_HAPPINESS.title: Ordinary Happiness
ORDINARY_HAPPINESS.description: Upon pickup, add a [gold]Melt[/gold] to your deck.
ORDINARY_HAPPINESS.flavor: Let's live happily together from now on.
KAGUYA-RUNDOWN_APARTMENT.title: Run-Down Apartment
KAGUYA-RUNDOWN_APARTMENT.description:
At the start of each combat, enter [gold]Reality[/gold].
At the start of each turn, gain 1 [gold]Creation[/gold].
KAGUYA-RUNDOWN_APARTMENT.flavor: A worn but warm little room, where dreams began.
KAGUYA-LUXURY_APARTMENT.title: Luxury Apartment
KAGUYA-LUXURY_APARTMENT.description:
At the start of each combat, enter [gold]Reality[/gold] and gain 4 [gold]Creation[/gold].
At the start of each turn, gain 2 [gold]Creation[/gold].
KAGUYA-LUXURY_APARTMENT.flavor: A brand new start, symbolizing victory in the Yachiyo Cup!
KAGUYA-NAI_BOW.title: Nai's Bow
KAGUYA-NAI_BOW.description:
Whenever you play 6 Attack cards in the same turn, deal {Damage} damage to a random enemy and [pink]Stun[/pink] them.
(Stun only triggers once per combat)
KAGUYA-NAI_BOW.flavor: Precise and elegant, each arrow may bring an unexpected surprise.
KAGUYA-LANDMINE_TRAP.title: Landmine Trap
KAGUYA-LANDMINE_TRAP.description: The first time you would take unblocked damage each combat, prevent it and deal that much damage to all enemies.
DATA_USB.title: Data USB
DATA_USB.description: Upon pickup, add a [gold]Limit Release[/gold] to your deck.
BROTHERS_DEPOSIT.title: Big Brother's Savings
LEI_BIG_SWORD.title: Lei's Greatsword
LEI_BIG_SWORD.description: Upon pickup, add a [gold]Curtain Call[/gold] to your deck.
LEI_BIG_SWORD.flavor: Lightning flashes, one slash, curtain call.
KAGUYA-LIVE_STREAMING.title: Live Streaming
KAGUYA-LIVE_STREAMING.description: Draw 1 additional card at the start of each turn. If you play at least 5 cards in a turn, draw 1 fewer card next turn instead.
KAGUYA-LIVE_STREAMING.flavor: Thank you for always watching me.
KAGUYA-COSTUME_SYSTEM.title: Costume System
KAGUYA-COSTUME_SYSTEM.description:
Upon pickup, lose all gold.
Choose a card to [gold]Transform[/gold], then choose a card to [gold]Upgrade[/gold].
KAGUYA-COSTUME_SYSTEM.flavor: Before you set off, let's put on some more interesting outfits~
KAGUYA-YACCHO_SPECIAL_CARE.title: Yachiyo's Special Care
KAGUYA-YACCHO_SPECIAL_CARE.description: You can receive [gold]Special Care[/gold] from Yachiyo at rest sites.
KAGUYA-KAGUYA_HAMMER.title: Kaguya's Hammer
KAGUYA-KAGUYA_HAMMER.description: Every [gold]6th[/gold] Attack card you play deals double damage.
KAGUYA-KAGUYA_HAMMER.flavor: A heavy blow, ready to strike.
KAGUYA-GLUTTONOUS_FLYING_FISH.title: Gluttonous Flying Fish
KAGUYA-GLUTTONOUS_FLYING_FISH.descriptio: The first time in each combat that you end your turn without playing any cards, gain 1 [gold]Intangible[/gold].
KAGUYA-GLUTTONOUS_FLYING_FISH.flavor: Honestly, I never thought of doing it this way...
KAGUYA-MOON_HEADDRESS.title: Moon Headdress
KAGUYA-MOON_HEADDRESS.description:
At the start of each turn, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
[gold]Kaguya[/gold] will take over your second turn.
KAGUYA-MOON_HEADDRESS.flavor: Do this, then that — smash them all!
KAGUYA-FUSHI_DOLL.title: Fushi Doll
KAGUYA-FUSHI_DOLL.description: At the start of each combat, gain {Overwork:diff()} [gold]Overwork[/gold] and [gold]Scry[/gold] {ScryAmount}.
KAGUYA-FUSHI_DOLL.flavor: If this is what Yachiyo wants...
KAGUYA-IROHA_IPAD.title: Iroha's iPad
KAGUYA-IROHA_IPAD.description: At the start of each turn, remove 1 [gold]Overwork[/gold] and gain {CreationPower:diff()} [gold]Creation[/gold].
KAGUYA-IROHA_IPAD.flavor: You'll stay with me until the good ending, right?
KAGUYA-IROHA_SCHEDULE.title: Iroha's Schedule
KAGUYA-IROHA_SCHEDULE.description: At the start of each turn, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}. The first time you play a card in a turn, gain {Overwork:diff()} [gold]Overwork[/gold].
KAGUYA-GASHAPON_MACHINE_L1.title: Gashapon Machine
KAGUYA-GASHAPON_MACHINE_L1.description: Upon pickup, randomly obtain 2 relics from all vanilla Ancient relics on this floor, and add an [gold]eternal[/gold] [purple]Guarantee[/purple] to your deck.
KAGUYA-GASHAPON_MACHINE_L1.flavor: Holy crap, I got a gold!
KAGUYA-GASHAPON_MACHINE_L2.title: Gashapon Machine
KAGUYA-GASHAPON_MACHINE_L2.description: Upon pickup, randomly obtain 2 relics from all vanilla Ancient relics on this floor except [purple]Daver[/purple], and add an [gold]eternal[/gold] [purple]Guarantee[/purple] to your deck.
KAGUYA-GASHAPON_MACHINE_L2.flavor: Holy crap, I got a gold!
KAGUYA-GASHAPON_MACHINE_L3.title: Gashapon Machine
KAGUYA-GASHAPON_MACHINE_L3.description: Upon pickup, randomly obtain 2 relics from all vanilla Ancient relics on this floor except [purple]Daver[/purple], and add an [gold]eternal[/gold] [purple]Guarantee[/purple] to your deck.
KAGUYA-GASHAPON_MACHINE_L3.flavor: Holy crap, I got a gold!
KAGUYA-SUN_HEADDRESS.title: Kaguya's Petition
KAGUYA-SUN_HEADDRESS.description:
At the start of each turn, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
[gold]Kaguya[/gold] will take over every turn of yours.
KAGUYA-SUN_HEADDRESS.flavor: Fine... don't come crying if you screw up...
KAGUYA-ROKA_MAKEUP_BAG.title: Roka's Makeup Bag
KAGUYA-ROKA_MAKEUP_BAG.description: At the start of each turn, choose 1 of {Cards} random cards to add to your hand. The chosen card gains [gold]Ethereal[/gold].
KAGUYA-ROKA_MAKEUP_BAG.flavor: An exquisite makeup bag, hiding surprises within.
KAGUYA-ROKA_NAIL_ART.title: Roka's Nail Art
KAGUYA-ROKA_NAIL_ART.description: Upon pickup, [gold]Transform[/gold] up to {Cards} cards into [gold]Nail Art[/gold].
KAGUYA-ROKA_NAIL_ART.flavor: Exquisite nail art, the art of the fingertips.
KAGUYA-CHARMING_ANTLER.title: Charming Antler
KAGUYA-CHARMING_ANTLER.description: At the start of combat, add {Cards} [gold]Dazed[/gold] to your draw pile and [gold]Stun[/gold] all enemies.
KAGUYA-CHARMING_ANTLER.flavor: The antler gleams with a captivating light.
KAGUYA-MAMI_ONIGIRI.title: Mami's Onigiri
KAGUYA-MAMI_ONIGIRI.description: For every 6 cards in your [gold]deck[/gold], heal [green]{HealPerFive}[/green] HP at the end of combat.
KAGUYA-MAMI_ONIGIRI.flavor: A humble rice ball, bringing true satiety.
KAGUYA-MAMI_GOURMET_GUIDE.title: Mami's Gourmet Guide
KAGUYA-MAMI_GOURMET_GUIDE.description: For every {Threshold} cards in your [gold]deck[/gold], draw 1 additional card at the start of your turn.
KAGUYA-MAMI_GOURMET_GUIDE.flavor: Recommended by a famous food blogger in Tsukuyomi!
KAGUYA-SPOON_AND_FORK.title: Spoon & Fork
KAGUYA-SPOON_AND_FORK.description: The first 2 times each turn you play a card of a different type than the previous card, draw 1 card.
KAGUYA-SPOON_AND_FORK.flavor: Spoon and fork? What are they for?
KAGUYA-SUPERDIMENSIONAL_KAGUYA.title: Superdimensional Kaguya!
KAGUYA-SUPERDIMENSIONAL_KAGUYA.descripti:
You may choose up to 2 options at [gold]rest sites[/gold].
The 8th card you play each combat gains [gold]Replay 1[/gold].
KAGUYA-SUPERDIMENSIONAL_KAGUYA.flavor: A princess beyond time and space — she will bring miracles!
KAGUYA-DOLL_SIZED_GIRL.title: Doll-Sized Girl
KAGUYA-DOLL_SIZED_GIRL.flavor: Why did I bring her back...
KAGUYA-SWADDLED_INFANT.title: Swaddled Infant
KAGUYA-SWADDLED_INFANT.flavor: I just couldn't leave her outside alone...
KAGUYA-SEA_SLUG_MEMORY.title: Sea Slug's Memory
KAGUYA-SEA_SLUG_MEMORY.description: Upon pickup, [gold]Transform[/gold] up to [gold]8[/gold] cards in your deck, lose [red]16[/red] Max HP.
KAGUYA-SEA_SLUG_BLESSING.title: Sea Slug's Blessing
KAGUYA-SEA_SLUG_BLESSING.description:
Upon pickup, gain [green]16[/green] Max HP.
At the start of each turn, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
KAGUYA-TIMELESS_BOND.title: Timeless Bond
KAGUYA-TIMELESS_BOND.description: Upon pickup, if you have [gold]Superdimensional Kaguya[/gold], gain [green]25[/green] Max HP, gain {Energy:energyIcons()} at the start of each turn, draw [gold]1[/gold] card, and add a [gold]Good Ending[/gold] to your [gold]deck[/gold].
KAGUYA-TIMELESS_BOND.flavor: A bond that transcends time and space.
KAGUYA-SUPER_GASHAPON_MACHINE.title: Super Gashapon Machine
KAGUYA-SUPER_GASHAPON_MACHINE.descriptio: Upon pickup, randomly obtain [gold]3[/gold] relics from all vanilla Ancient relics except [blue]Neow[/blue], [purple]Daver[/purple], and [red]Waku[/red].
MOON_HEADDRESS.approval: [gold]Hey~ Maybe I should marry you, I~ro~ha~[/gold]
KAGUYA-MEMORY_FRAGMENT_START.title: Memory Fragment · Beginning
KAGUYA-MEMORY_FRAGMENT_START.flavor: The first memory, blurry but warm.
KAGUYA-MEMORY_FRAGMENT_DAILY.title: Memory Fragment · Daily Life
KAGUYA-MEMORY_FRAGMENT_DAILY.description:
Upon pickup, gain [gold]68[/gold] Gold.
You may [gold]Remember[/gold] at campfires.
KAGUYA-MEMORY_FRAGMENT_CONCERT.title: Memory Fragment · Concert
KAGUYA-MEMORY_FRAGMENT_CONCERT.descripti:
Upon pickup, gain [gold]100[/gold] Gold.
You may [gold]Remember[/gold] at campfires.
KAGUYA-MEMORY_FRAGMENT_CONCERT.flavor: [jitter][purple]“I hope tonight becomes an unforgettable night...”[/purple][/jitter]
KAGUYA-MEMORY_FRAGMENT_RESOLUTION.title: Memory Fragment · Resolution
KAGUYA-MEMORY_FRAGMENT_RESOLUTION.flavor: [jitter][blue]“There will be no bad endings here, not as long as I'm here!”[/blue][/jitter]
